title: Deserialize a raw register-user DTO
scenario: An HTTP adapter receives partial, untrusted data. Start by representing that boundary data separately from the domain command.
instructions: Define RegisterUserDto with public email and display_name Option<String> fields, and derive serde::Deserialize so JSON boundary input can create it directly.

hints.body: DTOs model transport input, so public fields are acceptable at the boundary.
Option<String> lets serde represent missing JSON fields as None.
Derive Deserialize on the DTO, not on the domain command.

completionExplanation: The adapter DTO can now be built from JSON while still keeping untrusted boundary data separate from validated domain data.
